items.q: How do I access the library?
items.a: Your student ID card doubles as your library card. Tap it at the entry gate. Library hours are 8 AM to 9 PM on weekdays, 9 AM to 5 PM on weekends.

items.q: How many books can I borrow?
items.a: Undergraduate students can borrow up to 5 books for 14 days, renewable twice if no one else has reserved them.

items.q: Can I access the library online?
items.a: Yes — the e-library portal (library.greenfield.edu) gives access to e-books, journals, and past exam papers using your student login.
